Home / Product / Elevator / Elevator Door

Elevator Door

700, 800, 900, 1000, 1200mm

Painted, Stainless steel

Please add the quotation and send it to us and get in touch with us immediately

  • Globle service 24/7
  • Lowest price for all products
  • Best quality with Production Process
  • After-Sale Warranty
  • Technical Support
Spread the love
  • Description
  • Additional information

 

Lang door:

  • Width: 700, 800, 900, 1000, 1200
  • Opening way: Center, Side
  • Panel’s material: Painted, Stainless steel

Car door:

  • Type: ECO, VVVF
  • Width: 700, 800, 900, 1000, 1200
  • Opening way: Center, Side
  • Panel’s material: Painted, Stainless steel
  1. Elevator door is a very important component in the elevator, and it is also what passengers can see, especially the appearance. The quality can be directly reflected in the eyes of passengers.
  2. The surface can also be made into painted, stainless steel, etching, mirror and other styles.
  3. There are many types of it, including European-style and Japanese-style. European-style are complicated to install, but they are very safe, while Japanese-style are simple to install and low in price. European-style are popular in Europe and the Middle East, while Japanese-style are popular in China and Southeast Asia.
  4. We can produce various types, the factory is located in Jiangsu, China
  5. If you don’t know how to choose a model, our professional team will give you technical guidance. If you have after-sales problems, we will help you solve them as soon as possible, through chat tools, or voice or video calls

You can also consider some related parts

Packing and Shipping

Width

1200, 700, 800, 900
Panel Material

Painted, Stainless steel
Opening Way

Center, Left, Right
